story.description: This transcript documents an interview focusing on family history, childhood experiences, and community life. Michelle and Vera Taylor discuss their lives in Bloomfield, Hartford, and Jamaica, covering topics like childhood memories, school experiences, and family dynamics. They reflect on cultural heritage, including Jamaican traditions and the presence of farm workers in Connecticut. The interview touches on the evolution of racial and cultural demographics in the area, changes in the community, and personal milestones such as anniversaries and birthdays. It concludes with reflections on life lessons, community involvement, and future aspirations for younger generations.
story.title: michelle taylor oral history.WAV
